creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 207016
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.12.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to 2.12.0. A changelog is available at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.12.0, there are no breaking changes.

The update has passed portlint and poudriere testport.

Apologies for the late update.

-David
